title: taraxacum obovatifolium
intro: Taraxacum obovatifolium is a type of dandelion, specifically a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and kidney issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum obovatifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum obovatifolium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the roots and leaves in hot water or a solvent to extract its medicinal compounds.
